refnamediv.refpurpose: Impose marker minima on an image.

listitem.para: Boolean or binary marker image with the same height and width as image.
Double image in which every marked pixel is set below the original global minimum.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Sets all requested marker pixels to one intensity unit below the image minimum. This creates explicit low points in a topographic image while leaving every unmarked value unchanged.

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.para: Related workflow: OpenCV marker-based watershed tutorial.
